title: Short title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 31.  NEIGHBORHOOD ENHANCEMENT PROGRAM ACT

§1270.1.  Short title

This Chapter shall be known as the Neighborhood Enhancement Program Act.

Acts 2004, No. 908, §1, eff. upon appropriation of funds by the legislature.

NOTE:  Acts 2004, No. 908 (if it becomes effective) effective until June 30, 2010, and void thereafter.

CHAPTER 31.  NEIGHBORHOOD ENHANCEMENT PROGRAM ACT
§1270.1.  Short title
This Chapter shall be known as the Neighborhood Enhancement Program Act.
Acts 2004, No. 908, §1, eff. upon appropriation of funds by the legislature.
NOTE:  Acts 2004, No. 908 (if it becomes effective) effective until June 30, 2010, and void thereafter.
